name: @binkley/markdown-bdd-transpiler
description: An AI-augmented BDD testing framework that transpiles Markdown user journeys into Playwright tests.
author: B. K. Oxley (binkley) <binkley@alumni.rice.edu>

scripts.?build: echo "Compile the TypeScript codebase to the dist/ directory"
scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:sh
scripts.?type-check: echo "Verify TypeScript type safety without emitting files"
scripts.?test: echo "Run both fast unit tests and the full E2E suite"
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
scripts.?test:unit: echo "Run fast native Node.js unit tests with coverage"
scripts.?test:e2e: echo "Boot Docker and run the full Playwright integration suite"
scripts.?test:example: echo "Test the tutorial example BDD file to ensure the tutorial works"
scripts.?cache:clear: echo "Instantly wipe the AI cache file (bdd-cache.json) to an empty state without transpiling"
scripts.?cache:ignore: echo "Dry-run transpilation bypassing the cache (forces AI evaluation but does not save to disk)"
scripts.?cache:refresh: echo "Wipe the cache and immediately re-transpile all files to rebuild it from scratch"
scripts.cache:refresh: npm run cache:clear && npm run transpile
scripts.?cache:update: echo "Surgically re-transpile specific files, overwriting their cache entries (e.g., npm run cache:update -- tests/login.md)"
scripts.?profile: echo "Benchmark the execution time of any arbitrary NPM command"
scripts.?profile:e2e: echo "Benchmark the Dockerized E2E test pipeline"
scripts.profile:e2e: npm run profile -- profile-e2e npm run test:e2e
scripts.?release: echo "Trigger a semantic version bump and NPM publish (Maintainers only -- patch, minor, or major)"
scripts.?validate:commit: echo "Run the fast pre-commit pipeline (skips Docker tests)"
scripts.?validate:push: echo "Run the strict pre-push pipeline (includes E2E Docker tests)"
